home_tagline: Motivated IT graduate with hands-on experience in software development and a growing focus on cloud technologies and system/network administration.
home_intro: Aspiring Cloud Engineer with a strong foundation in software development, cloud computing, and system administration. Passionate about AWS, Azure, Terraform, DevOps, and building secure, scalable cloud infrastructure while continuously learning and solving real-world challenges.
about_bg: Motivated IT graduate with hands-on experience in software development and a growing focus on cloud technologies and system/network administration. Strong problem-solving skills with experience in developing efficient, reliable code. Passion-driven to continuously learn and contribute to scalable, infrastructure-driven solutions and innovative projects.
about_interests: Cloud Computing, AWS + Terraform, Azure, System Administration, DevOps
about_goals: Contributing to scalable, infrastructure-driven solutions that make a real impact. Continuously learning and staying current with emerging cloud technologies. Building innovative projects that solve real-world problems. Growing as a cloud architect and DevOps specialist.
about_passion: I am passionate about technology that makes a difference. From optimizing cloud costs to improving deployment pipelines, I believe in building systems that are both powerful and efficient.
about_achievements: AWS Cloud Architect & Azure, System Administrator Training. Professional experience at Deutsche Rentenversicherung. 3+ years of university teaching experience. Multiple successful project deliveries. B2 Level German Certification.
education_dci: IT System Administrator & Cloud Architect (AWS, Azure)
